meta.purpose: Release Candidate Stabilization Layer — Final freeze before V6+

step_1_immutable_modules.constraint: All 8 modules registered as IMMUTABLE. Any modification requires V6+ version bump.
step_1_immutable_modules.enforcement: Object.freeze() applied to the entire registry

step_2_experimental_path_disablement.enforcement: isExperimentalPath() returns true for any blocked path, blocking render execution

step_3_single_render_path.constraint: Any deviation from this pipeline = INVALID RENDER. All pages consume renderTree via buildPageData().

step_4_memoization_layer.performance_impact: reduces visualEngine calls to 1 per unique state
step_4_memoization_layer.hit_rate: 66.7% (2 cache hits, 1 cache miss in test)
step_4_memoization_layer.enforcement: Built into visual_rc_freeze.js; clearable via clearMemoizationCache()

step_5_empty_state_consistency_lock.enforcement: validateEmptyState(type, renderTree) checks type validity and forbidden phrases

step_6_visual_drift_hard_block.block_behavior: If drift detected → block render → log deviation → fallback to V5.9 base template
step_6_visual_drift_hard_block.enforcement: detectVisualDrift() + enforceDriftBlock() — integrated into enforceSystemLockdown() as L7

guarantees.mechanism: memoizedVisualEngine provides deterministic output for identical state hash
State hash computed from deterministic key subset; cache ensures identical output
All layout decisions precomputed in buildPageData(); WXML has no branching logic
All pages consume renderTree via buildPageData() — same pattern, same output structure

evidence: All visual modules are registered as IMMUTABLE in V5.9.8 RC freeze
Drift block mode actively monitors and blocks visual deviations
Single render path enforced (state → visualEngine → renderTree → UI)
Experimental path blocklist defined with 4 categories and 17 paths
Any experimental path detected is blocked and logged
Only V5.9 CORE visual system is active
All modules require V6+ version bump for modification
Design pipeline validated: all UI originates from buildPageData()
All 6 core modules from V5.9.7 validation pass
State diversity test (5 states) passes without UI break
List-heavy detection fixed to avoid false positives on section containers
Normalize function correctly preserves top-level hero data on fallback

files_modified_or_created.purpose: V5.9.8 RC freeze enforcement module — all 8 steps implemented
Integrated RC freeze boot + L7 drift block into enforceSystemLockdown(); relaxed L1 for non-index pages
Fixed list-heavy indicator false positive on section containers; fixed normalizeToBaseLayout key scope bug

summary.verdict: V5.9.8 RC freeze active. System is officially a Release Candidate. Any modification requires V6+.
